title: Materials Collected by Category
query: SELECT SUM(Count) AS total FROM MaterialCollected WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Category AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM MaterialCollected WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Category ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} units of materials gathered across all categories during the report period. The three material categories feed different engineering paths — a Manufactured-heavy chart signals combat engineering; lots of Encoded materials means data-scanning work; Raw dominance indicates surface SRV grinding.
details.help: MaterialCollected Category values are Raw, Manufactured, and Encoded. total drives the title as the combined gathering volume.

tagLines: Material collection totals compiled. Category distribution noted in the engineering supply log.
Three categories. Three kinds of grind. The balance between them shows where you spent your time.
Materials don't gather themselves. Every unit here cost you time in the ring, the battlefield, or the surface.
